zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Farr於1595年4月19日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾艾普沃斯時，他的父親Farr25歲，母親Farr21歲。他於大約1616年與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭結婚。他埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓哈爾斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Farr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English fear(r), farre (Old English fearr) ‘steer, ox’, applied as a nickname for a fierce man or a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a bull.
German: nickname from Middle High German varne, var, with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Farr was born on 19 April 1595, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Farr, was 25 and his mother, Farr, was 21. He married Elizabeth about 1616, in England, United Kingdom. He was buried in Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Farr(이)가 1595년 4월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 p워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Farr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Farr(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1616년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 찰레스타운에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Farr родился 19 апреля 1595 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Farr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Farr, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1616 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он был похоронен в местности чарльстоун, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
